allow: Bash(python -c "import pandas as pd; df = pd.read_csv\('data/ai4i2020.csv'\); print\('Total rows:', len\(df\)\); print\('Unique UDI:', df['UDI'].nunique\(\)\); print\('Unique Product ID:', df['Product ID'].nunique\(\)\); print\('Max UDI count:', df['UDI'].value_counts\(\).max\(\)\); print\('Max Product ID count:', df['Product ID'].value_counts\(\).max\(\)\)")
